description: Extract text from a document in a specific format (PDF, DOCX, CSV, text).

tools.description: Extract clean text (and table text) from a document: PDF, DOCX, CSV, or plain text. Read the file from an AIDP source_uri (master volume or workspace), from base64 bytes (content_base64), or from inline text (content). Optionally write the extracted text back to dest_uri. Use to turn a document into text for the agent or for RAG.

schema.name: content_base64
schema.description: The file bytes, base64-encoded (for pdf/docx/binary). Use this OR content OR source_uri.

schema.name: content
schema.description: Plain text/CSV content directly. Use this OR content_base64 OR source_uri.

schema.name: source_uri
schema.description: AIDP URI to read the document from. Formats: master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/path, workspace:/path, or <catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/path (treated as master:). Use this OR content_base64 OR content.

schema.name: dest_uri
schema.description: Optional AIDP URI to write the extracted text (or raw CSV) to. Same URI formats as source_uri. Best-effort: write errors surface in the response data and do not fail extraction.

schema.name: format
schema.description: File format. Inferred from source_uri or filename when omitted.

schema.name: filename
schema.description: Optional filename; the format is inferred from its extension if format is not given.

schema.name: page_start
schema.description: PDF only: first page to extract (1-based, inclusive). Default 1.

schema.name: page_end
schema.description: PDF only: last page to extract (1-based, inclusive). Default = last page.

_confDescriptions.max_chars: Cap on extracted text length (characters); output is truncated past this limit.
_confDescriptions.max_csv_rows: Max number of CSV rows to render to text; extra rows are dropped with a truncation marker.
_confDescriptions.max_input_bytes: Max input file size in bytes (decoded from content_base64 or read from source_uri). Default 26214400 (25 MiB).
_confDescriptions.region: OCI region for AIDP file IO (e.g. us-chicago-1). Required when using source_uri / dest_uri with master: URIs. Falls back to OCI_REGION env var.
_confDescriptions.data_lake_ocid: AIDP data lake OCID for file IO. Required when using source_uri / dest_uri with master: URIs. Falls back to DATALAKE_ID env var or context_vars.datalake_id.
_confDescriptions.workspace_id: AIDP workspace ID, required when using source_uri / dest_uri with workspace: URIs.
_confDescriptions.api_version: AIDP API version segment in the base URL. Default 20260430 (do NOT use 20240831 — that path lacks the volume/workspace IO endpoints).
_confDescriptions.service_path: AIDP service path segment in the base URL. Default aiDataPlatforms (do NOT use dataLakes — it lacks the IO endpoints).
_confDescriptions.auth_mode: OCI auth mode for AIDP file IO: resource_principal (default), instance_principal, or user_principal.
_confDescriptions.tenancy_ocid: OCI tenancy OCID. Required when auth_mode is user_principal.
_confDescriptions.user_ocid: OCI user OCID. Required when auth_mode is user_principal.
_confDescriptions.fingerprint: OCI API key fingerprint. Required when auth_mode is user_principal.
_confDescriptions.private_key_content: OCI API private key (PEM). Required when auth_mode is user_principal.
_confDescriptions.pass_phrase: Optional passphrase for the OCI API private key.
_confDescriptions.timeout: HTTP timeout (seconds) for AIDP file IO calls. Default 30.
